arabic: وَصَلْتُ إِلَى الْمَطَارِ وَانْتَظَرْتُ حَقِيبَتِي عِنْدَ سَيْرِ الْأَمْتِعَةِ. مَرَّتْ نِصْفُ سَاعَةٍ وَلَمْ تَصِلْ حَقِيبَتِي. ذَهَبْتُ إِلَى مَكْتَبِ الْأَمْتِعَةِ الضَّائِعَةِ وَأَبْلَغْتُهُمْ عَنِ الْمُشْكِلَةِ. طَلَبُوا مِنِّي وَصْفَ الْحَقِيبَةِ وَإِعْطَاءَهُمْ رَقَمَ تَذْكَرَتِي. وَعَدُونِي بِإِيصَالِ الْحَقِيبَةِ إِلَى الْفُنْدُقِ فِي أَقْرَبِ وَقْتٍ.
translation: Stigao sam na aerodrom i čekao sam svoju torbu na traci za prtljagu. Prošlo je pola sata i moja torba nije stigla. Otišao sam u ured za izgubljenu prtljagu i prijavio sam problem. Zamolili su me da opišem torbu i dam im broj karte. Obećali su mi da će torbu dostaviti u hotel što je prije moguće.
translationEn: I arrived at the airport and waited for my bag at the luggage belt. Half an hour passed and my bag did not arrive. I went to the lost luggage office and reported the problem. They asked me to describe the bag and give them my ticket number. They promised to deliver the bag to my hotel as soon as possible.
